goal: Assembler persona: Franka inserts a cylindrical peg into a bushing fixture using impedance control with a force/torque sensor capping insertion force at 20 N. Realizes ONET SOC 51-2028 yrkesroll-assembler-peg-bushing-001.
thoughts: Distinction from CP-58 (peg-in-hole array + conveyor): single-peg, table-top, impedance-compliance path instead of cuRobo drop.
Distinction from CP-NEW-tactile-insertion (TacEx fallback + physx instability): uses validate_assembly_constraint pre-flight + explicit impedance params, no TacEx dependency.
Impedance: Franka in torque mode; Kx=[300,300,300] N/m, stiffness softened on Z to allow 20 N cap. Kr=[30,30,30] N·m/rad.
Force cap 20 N enforced via add_force_torque_sensor threshold=20.0 — simulation pauses pick-place on breach.
Bushing fixture = Cylinder prim (larger radius, hollow approximated as solid with PhysicsCollisionAPI) seated on table.
validate_assembly_constraint pre-flight confirms name/type/targets before runtime constraint creation.
setup_assembly_constraint binds peg → bushing with 3 mm tolerance; FixedJoint fires on alignment.

cuRobo NOT used for motion: impedance controller supplies Cartesian torque path; setup_pick_place_controller in target_source='curobo' for transit only; compliance layer takes over for last-5 mm descent.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Worktable
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Bushing fixture (larger cylinder, seated on table) ────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Bushing",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0, -0.25, 0.815],
    radius=0.025,
    height=0.04,
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Bushing", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Bushing", attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Peg (cylindrical workpiece placed on table to the right) ──────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Peg",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0.3, 0.1, 0.835],
    radius=0.018,
    height=0.05,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Peg", schema_name=api)

apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Peg", material_name="rubber")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Peg"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Peg", "/World/Bushing"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── Pre-flight: validate assembly constraint spec before creating it ───────────
validate_assembly_constraint(
    name="peg_into_bushing",
    type="coincident_axes",
    target_a={"path": "/World/Peg"},
    target_b={"path": "/World/Bushing"},
    tolerance_m=0.003,
    params={"axis": "Z", "force_cap_N": 20.0},
)

# ── Assembly constraint: peg → bushing, 3 mm tolerance ────────────────────────
setup_assembly_constraint(
    peg_path="/World/Peg",
    hole_path="/World/Bushing",
    tolerance=0.003,
    constraint_path="/World/AssemblyConstraint_PegBushing",
)

# ── Force / torque sensor — 20 N insertion force cap ─────────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=20.0,
    noise_std=0.05,
)

# ── Impedance controller — softened Z-stiffness for compliant insertion ───────
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    Kr=[30.0, 30.0, 30.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    Dr=[3.0, 3.0, 3.0],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Proximity sensor for pick detection ───────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.3, 0.1, 0.835],
    size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06],
)

# ── Pick-place controller: cuRobo for transit, drops at bushing center ─────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Peg"],
    destination_path="/World/Bushing",
    drop_target=[0, -0.25, 0.84],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bushing"],
    approach_height=0.12,
    lift_height=0.12,
)
extension_notes: Implements ONET SOC 51-2028 assembler persona. Key additions over CP-58: (1) single-peg table-top (no conveyor); (2) impedance controller for last-cm compliant descent; (3) validate_assembly_constraint pre-flight; (4) 20 N FT threshold honoring ONET force-limit spec. PhysX numerical instability (velocity blow-up during grip) is a known risk shared with tactile-insertion — mitigated by solver iteration count=16 + rubber material.
failure_modes: PhysX numerical instability: peg velocity spikes >200 km/s during Franka grip — shared with tactile-insertion; solver_position_iteration_count=16 mitigates but does not eliminate
Bushing is solid Cylinder (no subtractive hole) — peg lands on top face, not inside; real hollow bushing needs mesh import or CreateDeformableMesh
setup_impedance_controller dry_run=True — no live torque-mode control without ROS2 bridge; transit via cuRobo is rigid
drop_target Z=0.84 requires cuRobo IK reachability at that exact coordinate — verify with solve_ik if planning fails
validate_assembly_constraint type='insertion_axis' may not be in the known-type set — handler will return error; constraint still created
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# ── Bushing fixture ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{bushing_fixture.path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{bushing_fixture.position}},
    radius={{bushing_fixture.radius}},
    height={{bushing_fixture.height}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{bushing_fixture.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{bushing_fixture.path}}, attr_name="physics:approximation", value="convexHull")

# ── Peg ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}},
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position={{workpieces[0].position}},
    radius=0.018,
    height=0.05,
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{bushing_fixture.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

validate_assembly_constraint(
    name="peg_into_bushing",
    type="coincident_axes",
    target_a={"path": {{workpieces[0].path}}},
    target_b={"path": {{bushing_fixture.path}}},
    tolerance_m=0.003,
    params={"axis": "Z", "force_cap_N": {{ft_sensor.threshold}}},
)

setup_assembly_constraint(
    peg_path={{workpieces[0].path}},
    hole_path={{bushing_fixture.path}},
    tolerance=0.003,
    constraint_path="/World/AssemblyConstraint_PegBushing",
)

add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path={{ft_sensor.path}},
    parent_path={{ft_sensor.parent_path}},
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
    noise_std=0.05,
)

setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_frame="panda_hand",
    Kx=[300.0, 300.0, 80.0],
    Kr=[30.0, 30.0, 30.0],
    Dx=[30.0, 30.0, 10.0],
    Dr=[3.0, 3.0, 3.0],
    null_space_stiffness=0.5,
    null_space_damping=0.5,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    position={{pick_sensor.position}},
    size={{pick_sensor.size}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{bushing_fixture.path}},
    drop_target=[0, -0.25, 0.84],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{bushing_fixture.path}}],
    approach_height=0.12,
    lift_height=0.12,
)
